x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Command used to consolidate resources before compilation.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Command used to consolidate resources before compilation.

options.name: --fw
options.description: The target framework of the project.

options.name: --min-version
options.description: Minimum version expected for this tool.

options.name: --ref-pkg
options.description: Package references used by the project.

options.name: --ref-prj
options.description: Project references used by the project.

commands.name: clean
commands.description:
Delete the folders "bin", "obj" and "_vroot" in all
subdirectories

options.name: --appName
options.description:
Specify the name of the application.
Otherwise it is retrieved from
appsettings.json or the solution
name.

options.name: --appVersion
options.description:
Specify the version of the
application. Otherwise it is retrieve
from the 'Client' project.

options.name: --format
options.description:
The output format.
Allowed values are: json, csv.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The output file name; by default, the
file is created at the root of the
solution.

options.name: --framework
options.description:
Chooses a framework (mandatory for
multi-target projects).

options.name: --no-restore
options.description:
Do not restore the project before
scanning.

commands.name: cve
commands.description:
Retrieve application(s) CVE (Common Vulnerabilities and
Exposures)

options.name: --framework
options.description:
Chooses a framework (mandatory for
multi-target projects).

options.name: --no-restore
options.description:
Do not restore the project before
scanning.

commands.name: fix-charset
commands.description:
Change the character set of .cs, .razor and Dico.xml
files to UTF8.

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Filter to find files. (Default:
*.cs:*.razor:Dico.xml)
Default value is:
*.cs:*.razor:Dico.xml.

commands.name: install
commands.description:
Install or update additionnal resources (tearser,
templates)

options.name: --terser
options.description:
Install or update the terser required packages for JS
minimification.

commands.name: link
commands.description: Command used to link the project to the Lagoon sources.

options.name: --src-path
options.description:
Register the "Modules" path of the Lagoon
sources.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new Lagoon project

options.name: --description
options.description: Application description used to initialize the README.md file.

options.name: --name
options.description:
The name of the new solution file (<ApplicationName>.sln)
If no name is specified, the name of the output directory is used.

options.name: --force
options.description: Forces content to be generated even if it would change existing files.

options.name: --description
options.description: Application description used to initialize the README.md file.

options.name: --name
options.description:
The name of the new solution file (<ApplicationName>.sln)
If no name is specified, the name of the output directory is used.

options.name: --force
options.description: Forces content to be generated even if it would change existing files.

options.name: --terser
options.description:
Uninstall the terser required packages for JS
minimification.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Command used to update Lagoon packages versions.

options.name: --only-lagoon
options.description:
Don't update any packages other than the
Lagoon packages.

options.name: --no-ef
options.description:
Do not update Entity Framework Core .NET
Command-line Tools.

options.name: --no-patch
options.description: Don't apply patchs on projects sources.

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Do not restore the project before scanning.

options.name: --dotnet-fw
options.description:
Update the targeted .NET Framework version
for the application to the latest version
supported by Lagoon.

options.name: --save-version
options.description:
The path of the file to where write the
version number applied for the update.
